import wandb
import mlflow

def train_model(model, dataloader, epochs: int):
    for epoch in range(epochs):
        for batch_idx, (data, target) in enumerate(dataloader):
            loss = model.train_step(data, target)
            wandb.log({"train_loss": loss, "epoch": epoch, "batch": batch_idx})

def train_with_mlflow(model, dataloader, epochs: int):
    for epoch in range(epochs):
        for batch_idx, (data, target) in enumerate(dataloader):
            loss = model.train_step(data, target)
            mlflow.log_metric("train_loss", loss, step=epoch * len(dataloader) + batch_idx)

def evaluate_and_log(model, val_loader):
    for batch_idx, (data, target) in enumerate(val_loader):
        accuracy = model.evaluate(data, target)
        wandb.log({"val_accuracy": accuracy, "val_batch": batch_idx})
        mlflow.log_metric("val_accuracy", accuracy, step=batch_idx)

def grid_search(train_fn, configs: list[dict]):
    for i, config in enumerate(configs):
        for step in range(1000):
            metric = train_fn(config, step)
            wandb.log({"grid_metric": metric, "config_idx": i, "step": step})
